data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the cancellation of an upstream service (bleach) would automatically cancel the downstream services (tone and cut). However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that the system performs this action, indicating a clear gap in the requirement. The only bookings mentioned are the initial booking and a concurrent booking attempt, with no evidence of downstream bookings being automatically generated or canceled, which constitutes a failure to meet the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of automatic cancellation of downstream services when an upstream service is canceled.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
